meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože mezera je součástí referenčního obrázku

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]dvě oddělené čáry[/hlp] (každá 50px, mezera 30px).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="20" y="30"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="2" x="220" y="150"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3" x="120" y="250"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="4" x="280" y="60"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5" x="40" y="200"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="6" x="180" y="290"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
